concerns.text: FR-012 (Compute static_connectivity_strength) is missing a dedicated task. T014 implements sliding-window and static connectivity, but the specific calculation of 'mean of absolute values of all pairwise correlations per participant' required by FR-012 is not explicitly assigned to a task. T017 uses this value but does not define its generation logic.

SC-003 (Report ΔR² with 4 decimal places) lacks a specific task. T017 implements the OLS regression, but no task explicitly covers the calculation of the baseline model (static-only) and the subsequent subtraction to derive ΔR², nor the formatting to 4 decimal places.

FR-007 (Family-wise error correction) is referenced in T028, but the task description 'Implement family-wise error correction... per FR-007' is vague on the specific algorithm (max-T vs Bonferroni) required by the spec. While T028 exists, the lack of explicit algorithmic choice in the task description risks non-compliance with the specific FR-007 requirement.

User Story 4 (Data Validation) is placed in 'Phase 6' (Polish & Cross-Cutting Concerns) in the task list, despite the spec and plan defining it as a P1 pre-condition that MUST run before US1. This structural misplacement in the tasks document creates a logical execution order violation where the blocking pre-condition appears after the tasks it blocks.

Tasks T010 and T011 are marked 'OPTIONAL' in the task list, but the spec defines an 'Independent Test' and 'Acceptance Scenarios' for US1 as mandatory verification criteria. Treating mandatory acceptance criteria as optional tasks violates the requirement coverage.
